article_title: B.C. Reg. 244/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: Telecom Property Assessment Rates Rise for 2026 Under Updated BC Valuation Regulation
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has amended the Telecommunications Corporations Valuation Regulation, raising per-unit rates (e.g. from $640 to $685 and $504 to $539) and updating base installation cost tables effective 2026.
briefs.action_required: Review updated valuation tables and rates to forecast your 2026 property tax assessment liability.

key_dates.label: BC Telecom Corporations Valuation Regulation 2026 rates take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 244/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
